positive: A stylized, minimalist portrait of a forest fox silhouetted against a vibrant, celestial gradient background of deep indigo, amethyst, and warm gold. The fox is shown in a regal, sitting pose, with highly defined fur outlines and dramatic, sharp contrasts. Elements include subtle crescent moons and scattered, abstract constellations forming a bokeh effect. Composition is centered and balanced, with the fox occupying the middle third. Style is vector-illustration meets fine art engraving, highly detailed line work, volumetric lighting, graphic design print quality, suitable for apparel transfer. Clean lines, strong contrast, high resolution, UHD.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, watermark, signature, logo, text, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, amateur, messy, writing, cartoon, photo, photorealistic, messy background
